title: clematis patens var. tientaiensis
intro: Clematis patens var. tientaiensis, also known as Tientai clematis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Clematis genus. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clematis patens var. tientaiensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, while also possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be taken to alleviate various health conditions.
